[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 1000010 2
2 1000010 2
3 0001101 3
4 0001110 3
5 0010101 3
6 0110001 3
7 0111001 4

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0000100 1

34 43 0101001 3

56 65 1010011 4
67 76 0100001 2
70 07 0000001 1

35 53 0010001 2

57 75 0000101 2
